source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
    P.PERSON_ID,
    P.FIRST_NAME,
    P.LAST_NAME,
    P.AGE,
    P.JOB,
    P.HIREDATE,
    P.SALARY,
    L.STATE_CODE,
    L.STATE_NAME,
    L.CITY,
    L.ZIP_CODE,
    C.CLIENT_CODE,
    C.CLIENT_NAME,
    C.MANAGER_NAME,
    P.ACTIVE_FLAG
FROM PERSON P
LEFT JOIN LOCATIONS L ON P.LOCATION_ID = L.LOCATION_ID
LEFT JOIN CLIENTS C ON P.CLIENT_ID = C.CLIENT_ID
WHERE P.ACTIVE_FLAG = 'Y';
